{

        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": " [build-system]\r\n requires = [\"setuptools>=65\", \"wheel\"]\r\n build-backend = \"setuptools.build_meta\"\r\n\r\n [project]\r\n name = \"miniqueue\"\r\n version = \"0.1.0\"\r\n description = \"Local, production-style job queue and scheduler (mini Celery)\"\r\n readme = \"README.md\"\r\n requires-python = \">=3.12\"\r\n authors = [{ name = \"MiniQueue System\", email = \"REDACTED\" }]\r\n license = { text = \"MIT\" }\r\n classifiers = [\r\n   \"Programming Language :: Python :: 3\",\r\n   \"Programming Language :: Python :: 3.12\",\r\n   \"License :: OSI Approved :: MIT License\",\r\n   \"Operating System :: OS Independent\",\r\n]\r\n\r\n dependencies = [\r\n   \"fastapi>=0.115.0\",\r\n   \"uvicorn[standard]>=0.30.0\",\r\n   \"redis>=5.0.0\",\r\n   \"sqlalchemy[asyncio]>=2.0.0\",\r\n   \"aiosqlite>=0.19.0\",\r\n   \"pydantic>=2.0.0\",\r\n   \"pydantic-settings>=2.0.0\",\r\n   \"typer[all]>=0.12.0\",\r\n   \"httpx>=0.27.0\",\r\n   \"prometheus-client>=0.20.0\",\r\n   \"pyyaml>=6.0.0\",\r\n]\r\n\r\n [project.optional-dependencies]\r\n dev = [\r\n   \"pytest>=8.0.0\",\r\n   \"pytest-asyncio>=0.23.0\",\r\n   \"ruff>=0.4.0\",\r\n   \"mypy>=1.10.0\",\r\n   \"types-redis>=4.6.0.20240425\",\r\n]\r\n\r\n [project.scripts]\r\n miniqueue = \"miniqueue.cli:app\"\r\n\r\n [tool.setuptools]\r\n package-dir = { \"\" = \"src\" }\r\n\r\n [tool.setuptools.packages.find]\r\n where = [\"src\"]\r\n\r\n [tool.ruff]\r\n line-length = 100\r\n target-version = \"py312\"\r\n select = [\"E\", \"F\", \"I\", \"B\"]\r\n ignore = [\"E501\"]\r\n\r\n [tool.mypy]\r\n python_version = \"3.12\"\r\n strict = false\r\n disallow_untyped_defs = true\r\n disallow_incomplete_defs = true\r\n check_untyped_defs = true\r\n no_implicit_optional = true\r\n warn_unused_ignores = true\r\n warn_redundant_casts = true\r\n warn_unused_configs = true\r\n pretty = true\r\n\r\n [tool.pytest.ini_options]\r\n asyncio_mode = \"auto\"\r\n testpaths = [\"tests\"]\r\n\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "a858f1cb85ad2a13ce390a8f1ceafbffc05c03b5e197f8a4f3796fb9ae4c2784",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": "."
      },
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": " version: \"3.9\"\r\n \r\n services:\r\n   redis:\r\n     image: redis:7-alpine\r\n     ports:\r\n       - \"6379:6379\"\r\n \r\n   app:\r\n     build: .\r\n     image: miniqueue-app:latest\r\n     environment:\r\n       MINIQUEUE_DB_URL: \"sqlite+aiosqlite:///REDACTED\"\r\n       MINIQUEUE_REDIS_URL: \"redis://redis:6379/0\"\r\n       MINIQUEUE_QUEUE_DEFAULT: \"default\"\r\n       MINIQUEUE_CONSUMER_GROUP: \"workers\"\r\n     volumes:\r\n       - REDACTED\r\n     depends_on:\r\n       - redis\r\n \r\n   api:\r\n     image: miniqueue-app:latest\r\n     environment:\r\n       MINIQUEUE_SERVICE_NAME: \"api\"\r\n     command: >\r\n       uvicorn miniqueue.api_app:create_app\r\n       --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000\r\n     ports:\r\n       - \"8000:8000\"\r\n     depends_on:\r\n       - app\r\n \r\n   worker:\r\n     image: miniqueue-app:latest\r\n     environment:\r\n       MINIQUEUE_SERVICE_NAME: \"worker\"\r\n       MINIQUEUE_WORKER_CONCURRENCY: \"4\"\r\n      MINIQUEUE_METRICS_PORT: \"9100\"\r\n     command: [\"python\", \"-m\", \"miniqueue.worker\"]\r\n     depends_on:\r\n       - app\r\n \r\n   scheduler:\r\n     image: miniqueue-app:latest\r\n     environment:\r\n       MINIQUEUE_SERVICE_NAME: \"scheduler\"\r\n      MINIQUEUE_METRICS_PORT: \"9200\"\r\n     command: [\"python\", \"-m\", \"miniqueue.scheduler\"]\r\n     depends_on:\r\n       - app\r\n \r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "6d79317d02dd77de92fb53d3cd39439de2356c23394c56a1000cb77aa24a1dbb",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },

        "1:LEN": "."
      },
      "4:VARINT": 1
    }
  ]
}
